positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial sloth hanging from a crescent moon, rendered in the aesthetic of deep space stained glass and ethereal watercolor. The composition should feature strong, clean silhouettes against a contrasting gradient background of deep indigo and shimmering cosmic dust. Incorporate geometric celestial elements like orbiting rings and scattered constellations. The overall style must be highly decorative, high contrast, and perfectly centered for apparel printing. The sloth should look tranquil and dreamlike. Highly detailed, vector art quality, perfect for merchandise.
